lint.command: uv run black --check mtb/ tests/ scripts/

blockingIssues.description: mtb/quality_benchmarks/tool_call_parser.py:245 single-quote recovery mutates escaped apostrophes in argument strings (e.g., it\'s -> it\"s), corrupting extracted tool-call arguments.
mtb/quality_benchmarks/tool_calling_problems.py:714 _check_aa_preserve_exact_strings uses substring checks and accepts altered commands (e.g., appended shell fragments), creating false positives.
mtb/quality_benchmarks/tool_calling_problems.py:1668 fc_null_argument accepts empty-string or omitted values even though the problem requires null-argument format compliance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how TDD compliance is assessed and when handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure may be true, because multiple runs implemented code before tests while still reporting compliance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Same pattern observed in reviews for tool-call-parser, tool-calling-problems-selection-accuracy, tool-calling-problems-multi-edge-format, and runner-tool-call-support.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine "Existing test suite must pass unchanged" guidance to allow intentional updates to existing assertions when mission scope explicitly changes benchmark/problem counts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature tool-calling-problems-selection-accuracy needed updates to existing count assertions in tests/test_quality_benchmarks.py and tests/test_module_structure.py to reflect expanded tool-calling coverage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Undocumented ts_/aa_/mt_/ec_/fc_ prefix mapping in shared docs
